chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 1498 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5928/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 24.11.2025 Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate along with Petiitoners Mr. Sawnan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for Respondents/SIDA Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Shabbir Ahmed Bhutto, Director, SIDA Ghotki and DSR Mehboob Ahmed (Legal Officer), Pak Rangers Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Compliance report has been filed by Respondent No.3 / Director Ghotki Feeder Canal, Area Water Board, Ghotki, which is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the Petitioners. Perusal of the report reflects that an inquiry was conducted and thereafter Director Ghotki Feeder dismantled the outlets created at RD-123 along Bumbly Sub-Branch, such photographs are also attached. Under these circumstances, the instant Petition has served its purpose and is disposed of along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
